posts.raw_content:
It was the first graduation at the new high school with a very nice football stadium.  Both sides of bleachers were full and they even had overflow seating on one end of the field.  So lots of people.  

Ratio of whites, blacks and mexicans were about 80% white, 15% black and 5% mexican.  Guess which demographic displayed the loudest, rudest behavior?  You guessed it, the blacks. They were feral.  The mexicans on the other hand were very well behaved and actually very well dressed.  Most of the mexicans we saw the men and boys were dressed in shirts and ties (yes, even the kids) and the women were in dresses.

posts.raw_content:
It was the first graduation at the new high school with a very nice football stadium.  Both sides of bleachers were full and they even had overflow seating on one end of the field.  So lots of people.  

Ratio of whites, blacks and mexicans were about 80% white, 15% black and 5% mexican.  Guess which demographic displayed the loudest, rudest behavior?  You guessed it, the blacks. They were feral.  The mexicans on the other hand were very well behaved and actually very well dressed.  Most of the mexicans we saw the men and boys were dressed in shirts and ties (yes, even the kids) and the women were in dresses.
